args.query: SELECT DISTINCT "Index" FROM index_trade ORDER BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Index" FROM index_trade ORDER BY "Index";

args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN Close>Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN Close<Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE Date >= '2018-01-01' AND Date <= '2018-12-31' AND "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index" ORDER BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN Close>Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN Close<Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE Date >= '2018-01-01' AND Date <= '2018-12-31' AND "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index" ORDER BY "Index";

- IXIC (NASDAQ Composite): 44 up days, 31 down days
